dj_text: You're on That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. We have a zero-complaint policy. Just kidding. We have a zero-complaint-response policy. Suspekt - Proletar (Hvor Jeg Står) out. S.U.S.P.E.K.T. in. No questions.
commercial_text: You've stumbled onto Nostalgia Overload Radio from the Timeline That Wasn't.
hijack_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm.
recovery_text: HOW are they on our frequency?! That dimension doesn't even HAVE frequencies!
title: S.U.S.P.E.K.T.
